name: Synchronising Orders to Shippit
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can automate shipping workflows through Shippit integration with "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":", which synchronizes orders to Shippit's delivery management platform for streamlined carrier coordination and tracking. This shipping automation helps retail operators reduce manual dispatch processes and improve delivery efficiency, with effective Shippit integration typically improving shipping accuracy and reducing administrative overhead across Australian retail operations."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Shippit synchronization in "},{"text":"Retail Express","bold":true},{"text":" enables retail operators to automatically send fulfilled orders to Shippit for carrier allocation and tracking, helping ensure efficient delivery coordination and customer communication. This shipping integration helps ensure your retail operations can maintain professional delivery workflows while reducing manual data entry and supporting excellent customer delivery experiences."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiIZEAY.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiIZEAY.jpg","embedType":"image","displaySize":"large","float":"none","name":"shippit_integration (2).jpg"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Shippit integration combines the strength of Retail Express' inventory management with Shippit's advanced shipping features, allowing businesses to streamline their shipping processes and reduce manual double handling."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Shippit Integration is available for "},{"text":"$19 per month","bold":true},{"text":". To request a Licence, pleaseclick here."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you are not already a Shippit customer, please "},{"type":"a","url":"mailto:heather@shippit.com?subject=Retail%20Express%20Integration","children":[{"text":"contact Shippit"}]},{"text":" to set up an account"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Using Retail Express, staff will be able to fulfil instore and online sales, sending the order automatically to Shippit. Switching to the Shippit portal, the staff member will then be able to print address labels and book the order for delivery."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The synchronisation is one-way, meaning that changes made to the order within Shippit will not apply to Retail Express e.g. editing product information, deleting products from the delivery etc."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Before you begin"}],"data-id":"before-you-begin"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Before you can get started with Shippit you'll need to:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Purchase a Shippit Integration licence from Retail Express"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Configure the integration with Shippit as per the Settings - Configure Shippit Fulfilment Service article. 1"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Order Synchronisation Overview"}],"data-id":"order-synchronisation-overview"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Sales marked for Delivery are sent to Shippit when they're fulfilled in Retail Express, as long as the customer address details have been populated, a mapped Freight Type has been chosen for the order, and the Shippit settings have been configured correctly (see the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/494-synchronising-orders-to-shippit#Faqs","children":[{"text":"Faqs"}]},{"text":" for more information)."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"See the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/494-synchronising-orders-to-shippit#Faqs","children":[{"text":"Frequently Asked Questions"}]},{"text":" for a detailed look at the Order Synchronisation Conditions."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Prior to being fulfilled, staff will be able to make modifications to the order (for example changing the Source or Fulfil location). Once the product has been fulfilled it can't be modified on the sale, and staff can use Shippit to print labels and book a courier."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Products can be fulfilled through both POS and the Fulfilment Report - both methods will send the order to Shippit."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more detailed information on the Order Synchronisation process please refer to the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/494-synchronising-orders-to-shippit#Faqs","children":[{"text":"Frequently Asked Questions"}]},{"text":". For a list of Features and Limitations please refer to the Settings - Configure Shippit Fulfilment Service article."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Send a sale to Shippit - POS"}],"data-id":"send-a-sale-to-shippit-pos"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Any unfulfilled sale can be sent to Shippit using POS - they don't need to be new sales created manually (e.g. incoming web store sales processed through POS)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The order will synchronise as long as the sale is not yet fulfilled, the customer address details have been populated, a mapped Freight Type has been chosen for the order, and the Shippit settings have been configured correctly (see the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/494-synchronising-orders-to-shippit#Faqs","children":[{"text":"Faqs"}]},{"text":" for more information)."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"See the Synchronisation Conditions."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For this example we'll create and fulfil the sale through POS, although sales can also be fulfilled in bulk Sales are only synchronised at the point of fulfilment (covered in more detail below)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Fulfil the sale"}],"data-id":"fulfil-the-sale"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When products are fulfilled a Shipment Order will be sent to Shippit. use the External Order Reference field."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The External Order reference is used by the Shopify Connector and some ecom/web store API integrations to display the web store's invoice number (API developers would need to custom build this in)."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We recommend configuring your Shippit settings to use the External Order Reference field as the synchronised Order Reference number. Customers shopping online will see the same order number both on the web store and Shippit (if using Shippit tracking emails to customers). If an External Order Reference doesn't exist (e.g. an instore order) it will default back to using the Retail Express Invoice
